content: Phase A: Offline foundation (ai.js, api.js compat, push.js local notifs, ProfileContext, AIToolsContext, App.js providers, ProfileSwitcher, remove Emergent badge)
Phase B: Markdown.jsx + Assistant rewrite + Settings AI config + Profile multi-profile + KnowledgeBase autofill
Phase C: share.js + ShareDialog + branded cards + share buttons on MedicationDetail & TaperDetail
Phase C: esbuild verify + smoke test (add med offline + share dialog)
Verified: offline CRUD, multi-profile, AI config persistence across reload, Assistant graceful error handling (fake key), share dialog, Emergent badge removed
